quality.description_clarity: High. Clearly defines the effect, escape condition, and resolution.
quality.mechanics_completeness: High. Includes all necessary mechanical details (range, time, components, duration, save/check, class).

mechanics.escape_condition: Target uses an action to make a DC 20 Intelligence check. Success escapes the spell.
mechanics.exceptions: Minotaurs or maze demons automatically succeed on the escape check.
mechanics.resolution: If escaped or duration ends, target reappears in the original space or nearest unoccupied space.
mechanics.power_level_check: Level 8 for a powerful, concentration-based banishment with a very high DC (20) for escape suggests appropriate power level for the tier.

potential_issues: The spell does not specify what happens if the target fails the Intelligence check during their action (it is implied they remain trapped, but this could be stated explicitly).

llm_audit.archivist_notes: Data is consistent and well-structured. The mechanics are clearly defined, though explicitly stating that a failed check results in remaining trapped might improve clarity slightly.
